notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger. Christian Vázquez out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen plunked
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen hit by pitch. Evan Carter to 3rd. Alejandro Osuna to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to center fielder Brice Matthews.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen singles on a ground ball to pitcher Bryan Abreu. Joc Pederson to 2nd.
